message:
🌱 Add knative-eventing: Upgrade tests for knative eventing mission (#1552)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,77 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "knative-eventing-2271-upgrade-tests-for-knative-eventing",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "knative-eventing: Upgrade tests for knative eventing",
+    "description": "Upgrade tests for knative eventing. Community-requested feature.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current knative-eventing deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your knative-eventing version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n knative-eventing -l app.kubernetes.io/name=knative-eventing\nhelm list -n knative-eventing 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working knative-eventing installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review knative-eventing configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant knative-eventing configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n knative-eventing -l app.kubernetes.io/name=knative-eventing\nkubectl get configmap -n knative-eventing -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=knative-eventing\n```\n**Problem**\nFound basic issues when upgrading my cluster from v0.10.1 to current head (v0.11.0). This was fixed asap when brought up in slack channel. However it exposed a gap in E2E tests."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Upgrade tests for knative eventing",
+        "description": "- Adding upgrade & downgrade tests with a prober that can be used in e2e tests and in operator e2e tests\n- Tests can run with serving component, but it's not required\n\nFor more verbose description see: `test/upgrade/README.md` in changed files.\n\n**Release Note**\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Upgrade knative-eventing to include the fix",
+        "description": "If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade knative-eventing:\n```bash\nhelm repo update\nhelm upgrade knative-eventing knative-eventing/knative-eventing --namespace knative-eventing\n```\nVerify the upgrade:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n knative-eventing\nhelm list -n knative-eventing\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n knative-eventing -l app.kubernetes.io/name=knative-eventing\nkubectl get events -n knative-eventing --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Upgrade tests for knative eventing\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "- Adding upgrade & downgrade tests with a prober that can be used in e2e tests and in operator e2e tests\n- Tests can run with serving component, but it's not required\n\nFor more verbose description see: `test/upgrade/README.md` in changed files.\n\n**Release Note**",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "knative-eventing",
+      "graduated",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "knative-eventing"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "advanced",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/knative/eventing/issues/2271",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/knative/eventing",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/knative/eventing/pull/2388"
+    },
+    "reactions": 2,
+    "comments": 15,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with knative-eventing installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
